title: subversion bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.14.5-3]
- mod_dav_svn: inherit DavBasePath from mod_dav
  Resolves: RHEL-105424

[1.14.5-2]
- update to 1.14.5 (#2331047)
- use %autosetup
- enable tests by default again
- conditionalize Ruby tests (Yaakov Selkowitz)

[1.14.4-1]
- Rebase to version 1.14.4
- Resolves: rhbz#2317222
full_text:
[1.14.5-3]
- mod_dav_svn: inherit DavBasePath from mod_dav
  Resolves: RHEL-105424

[1.14.5-2]
- update to 1.14.5 (#2331047)
- use %autosetup
- enable tests by default again
- conditionalize Ruby tests (Yaakov Selkowitz)

[1.14.4-1]
- Rebase to version 1.14.4
- Resolves: rhbz#2317222

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20452-0.html
